fit_data_manifest.basis_evaluation_coordinates: unclipped local algebraic coordinates; ProductBasis applies AlgebraicMapping(1) internally
fit_data_manifest.target_transform: reference density square-root includes sum log|dx/dz|

nonclaims: Phase 6W rank-4 same-policy candidate does not by itself close rank convergence
rank convergence interpretation requires a reviewed same-policy convergence ledger
validation holdout may select or veto L1 candidates only inside the reviewed protocol
audit cloud remains reserved and not used for tuning
degree convergence remains blocked pending a reviewed configurable-basis path
ALS training is historical and stale for fixed-variant Zhao-Cui
training-base optimizer wiring is fixed_hmc_adaptation/extension mechanics, not a source-faithful author TT-cross proof
no author SIR fit quality claim
no d50 or d100 scale claim

optimizer_budget.training_convergence_policy: scheduler_stop_required_for_candidate_selection; validation selection is not rank convergence evidence
optimizer_budget.training_data_reuse_policy: fixed training cloud cycled by deterministic contiguous optimizer batches

adjacent_rank_stability_rule.large_improvement_policy: larger rank-5 improvement blocks rank convergence rather than passing it; consider later reviewed rank-6/model-selection diagnostic
adjacent_rank_stability_rule.large_regression_policy: larger rank-5 regression blocks rank convergence

rank4_selection_rule.block_policy: block if no rank-4 arm passes holdout threshold and vetoes
rank4_selection_rule.tie_policy: select rank-4 zero-L1 comparator if no positive-L1 arm clears the minimum improvement margin and zero-L1 passes all vetoes

phase_name: P86 Phase 6W same-policy rank convergence preflight

nonclaims: not rank or degree promotion evidence
smoke loss is not pilot evidence

zhao_cui_regularization_default_policy.owner_directive: L1 regularization with L1 weight tuning is the default Zhao-Cui training-base procedure going forward.
